question: 按月份统计订单金额趋势，并计算环比增长率
sql: WITH metric_by_period AS (SELECT substr(order_date,1,7) AS period, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders GROUP BY period) SELECT period, metric_value, LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period) AS previous_metric_value, ROUND((metric_value - LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period)) * 1.0 / LAG(metric_value) OVER (ORDER BY period), 4) AS growth_rate FROM metric_by_period ORDER BY period

question: 按客户地区统计订单金额
sql: SELECT customers.region AS dimension_value, SUM(orders.total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders JOIN customers ON orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id GROUP BY customers.region ORDER BY metric_value DESC

question: 销售金额排名前3的订单状态
sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT status, SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(total_amount) DESC) AS metric_rank FROM orders GROUP BY status) ranked WHERE metric_rank <= 3 ORDER BY metric_rank

question: 查询员工组织层级路径
sql: WITH RECURSIVE hierarchy AS (SELECT employee_id, manager_id, employee_name, CAST(employee_name AS TEXT) AS path, 1 AS depth FROM employees WHERE manager_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT child.employee_id, child.manager_id, child.employee_name, hierarchy.path || ' > ' || child.employee_name, hierarchy.depth + 1 FROM employees child JOIN hierarchy ON child.manager_id = hierarchy.employee_id) SELECT * FROM hierarchy ORDER BY path

question: 各商品品类的销售总额占比
sql: SELECT products.category AS dimension_value, SUM(order_items.amount) AS metric_value FROM order_items JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.product_id GROUP BY products.category ORDER BY metric_value DESC

question: 订单总金额
sql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) AS metric_value FROM orders
